FRAMEWORKS:
- vLLM
- Text Generation Inference (TGI)
- SGLang

NUMERIC_CLAIMS:
- vLLM achieves up to 24x higher throughput than HuggingFace Transformers on llama-2-7B at batch size 64
- SGLang reports up to 5x throughput vs vLLM on llama-3 8B with RadixAttention

cells.finalText:
AUTHORS: Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N. Gomez, Lukasz Kaiser, and Illia Polosukhin
METHODOLOGY: A sequence-transduction architecture based entirely on attention mechanisms, using an encoder-decoder structure with 6 stacked self-attention and position-wise feed-forward layers, eliminating recurrence and convolutions.
RESULTS: 28.4 BLEU on WMT 2014 EN-DE translation

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: Who are the authors of the original Transformer paper "Attention Is All You Need" published in 2017?

toolCalls.output: The paper "Attention Is All You Need" was authored by Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N. Gomez, Lukasz Kaiser, and Illia Polosukhin (Google Brain / Google Research / U. Toronto, 2017).

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: What is the core architectural innovation of the Transformer model described in "Attention Is All You Need" (2017)?

toolCalls.output: The paper introduces the Transformer, a sequence-transduction architecture based solely on attention mechanisms — dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely. The encoder-decoder structure uses 6 stacked self-attention + position-wise feed-forward layers each.

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: What was the headline BLEU score achieved by the Transformer model on the WMT 2014 EN-DE (English-to-German) translation task in "Attention Is All You Need" (2017)?

toolCalls.output: The Transformer achieves 28.4 BLEU on WMT 2014 English-to-German translation, improving over the previous best ensemble by 2.0 BLEU. On English-to-French, the single-model big-Transformer scores 41.0 BLEU after 3.5 days of training on 8 GPUs.

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: Describe the core architectural innovation of the Transformer model in "Attention Is All You Need" (2017), focusing on the self-attention mechanism and its role in the architecture.

toolCalls.output: The paper introduces the Transformer, a sequence-transduction architecture based solely on attention mechanisms — dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely. The encoder-decoder structure uses 6 stacked self-attention + position-wise feed-forward layers each.

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: Find the headline BLEU score achieved by the Transformer model on the WMT 2014 English-to-German (EN-DE) translation task in the "Attention Is All You Need" paper.

toolCalls.output: The Transformer achieves 28.4 BLEU on WMT 2014 English-to-German translation, improving over the previous best ensemble by 2.0 BLEU. On English-to-French, the single-model big-Transformer scores 41.0 BLEU after 3.5 days of training on 8 GPUs.
